title: Narasimha Mantra
intro: Read the Narasimha Mantra with meaning. Chant this supreme mantra to receive the grace of Lord Narasimha.
description:
Main Mantra

Om Ugram Viram Mahavishnum Jvalantam Sarvato Mukham.
Nrisimham Bhishanam Bhadram Mrityur Mrityum Namamyaham.

English Meaning

I bow to the fierce
and heroic Lord Vishnu,
who shines brilliantly
in all directions.
I bow to Lord Narasimha,
who is fearsome
yet supremely auspicious,
and who is
the conqueror of death
itself.

faq.q1: When should Lord Narasimha Mantra be chanted?
faq.a1: Lord Narasimha Mantra is considered auspicious when chanted in the morning, evening, or on Narasimha Jayanti.
faq.q2: How many times should Lord Narasimha Mantra be chanted?
faq.a2: It is commonly chanted 11, 21, 51, or 108 times.
faq.q3: What are the benefits of chanting Lord Narasimha Mantra?
faq.a3: According to Hindu tradition, chanting this mantra is believed to bring courage, protection, positive energy, and the blessings of Lord Narasimha.
faq.q4: Can Lord Narasimha Mantra be chanted daily?
faq.a4: Yes, Lord Narasimha Mantra can be chanted every day with devotion.
faq.q5: Can anyone chant Lord Narasimha Mantra?
faq.a5: Yes, anyone may chant Lord Narasimha Mantra with faith and devotion.
